---
title: "Splitting A Document From The Current Page"
---

You can split a document to create a new document by selecting the thumbnail image of the page from which the document will be split. A new document is created with the selected page and all the pages succeeding the selected page.

To split the document from the selected page:

1.  Select the relevant page in the document by clicking anywhere on the thumbnail image of that page. The page is highlighted.
2.  In the upper-right corner of the document area, click the vertical ellipsis icon.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
A drop-down menu is displayed.

3.  Click Split from current page or press Alt + S. A new document is created with the selected page and all the pages succeeding the selected page.
